ivrs.timeout_helper: Number of seconds to wait before replaying the menu or redirecting the call (default: 5 seconds).
ivrs.timeout_destination_helper: Redirects the call after the timeout. If not set, the menu will be replayed.
ivrs.invalid_destination_helper: Redirects the caller after an invalid choice. If not set, the menu will be replayed.
ivrs.max_tries_helper: Number of attempts before abandoning the call. Both timeouts and invalid choices are counted.
ivrs.abort_destination_helper: Redirects the call after the maximum number of attempts is reached.
ivrs.sound_menu_helper: These are the choices the user can make.
ivrs.sound_greeting_helper: This is the welcome message. No input can be made during this time.
ivrs.sound_invalid_helper: Played when an invalid input is made. Not used if a destination is set.
ivrs.sound_abort_helper: Played when the maximum number of attempts is reached. Not used if an abort destination is set.
